title: Was John Hutchinson Telekinetic?! #supernatural
summary: This interview segment discusses Canadian inventor John Hutchison and his anti-gravitational experiments, which were investigated by the DOD. The conversation explores whether the phenomena observed were caused by his equipment or by telekinetic abilities, noting that effects could not be replicated under laboratory conditions.

acronyms.definition: United States military department that investigated Hutchison's experiments

key_claims.claim: John Hutchison's anti-gravitational experiments were investigated by the DOD
When the equipment was set up under laboratory conditions, none of the effects could be replicated
People saw objects fly across the room off camera and outside of laboratory settings
